title: ProviderModelRef
description: A neutral reference to a specific `(provider, model)` pair. `pinned_snapshot` is required by `--deterministic` eval mode (research/11 §11); floating aliases are accepted but flagged as nondeterministic.

provider.description: Provider identifier. Open enum — well-known values include `nim`, `openai`, `anthropic`, `bedrock`, `local-openai`, `litellm`. Custom adapters add their own ID.

endpoint_url.description: Optional explicit endpoint override. Required for self-hosted NIM, vLLM, Ollama, llama.cpp. Defaults are baked into the adapter for hosted providers.

pinned_snapshot.description: Optional version-pinned snapshot string (e.g. `claude-4.7-2026-04-15`, Bedrock model ARN with version). Required when this ref is used inside a deterministic Eval; floating aliases like `claude-4.7-latest` MUST be rejected by the harness in deterministic mode.

params.description: Provider-specific parameter passthrough (e.g. `reasoning: true` for Nemotron `detailed thinking on`, `cache_control` strategy hints). Open object by design.
